text:
Thanks for send this pr.

I've test it and please commit.


2012/11/5 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>

> Maintainer of www/phalcon,
>
> Please note that PR ports/173370 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173370
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Daniel Lin (pct)
